buildCommand: npx vite build && npx esbuild api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=api/index.mjs --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --external:kerberos --external:@mongodb-js/zstd --external:@aws-sdk/credential-providers --external:snappy --external:socks --external:aws4 --external:mongodb-client-encryption --external:lightningcss --external:tailwindcss "--external:@tailwindcss/*" "--external:@babel/*"
